step_rationale: Very-long-chain saturated fatty acid; dyslipidemia and atherogenic lipid metabolism.
mechanism: Very-long-chain fatty-acid accumulation reflects atherogenic lipid dysmetabolism and increased acute coronary-syndrome risk.

references.title: Nontargeted Metabolomics Revealed Novel Association Between Serum Metabolites and Incident Acute Coronary Syndrome: A Mendelian Randomization Study.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
